issue.title: www.facebook.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.facebook.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2F) ### Comment > Page blanche après avoir voulu bloquer des pubs chiantes sponsorisées sur Facebook manuellement, je ne peux plus supprimer les règles utilisateurs sur ce site car l'option n'y est plus et je ne sais pas comment faire autrement qu'avec le bouton de Adguard. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/42fvwsexkneosgg88os0ckk00skwgs8rueipcw5zeo.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/rmti12c0esgkkws0wcw00ocswwooscog4q6s9wmmqo.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.40 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard French filter,
List-KR Filters last update: | 2026-04-17T21:00:48 Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (2880h)

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.40&system_version=Windows+10&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.3.16.17.227&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&filters_last_update=2026-04-17T21%3A00%3A48)
